companyDescription: Part of The Stronach Group, a global racing, wagering, and entertainment company that owns premier venues and events including Santa Anita Park, Gulfstream Park, and the Preakness Stakes.

Secured board-approved budget growth from $8M to $15M through comprehensive ROI forecasting
